# Development Log

## Project Name
AI Placement Prep Assistant

## AI Coding Assistant Used
ChatGPT

## AI Model Used
GPT-5.5 (ChatGPT)
Groq API - Llama 3 Model

## Important Prompts Given

1. Create a Streamlit web application for resume analysis.
2. Analyze a student's resume and provide strengths, weaknesses, missing skills, ATS score, and interview questions.
3. Improve the UI of the application.
4. Integrate Groq API with the Streamlit application.
5. Generate a professional README file for the project.

## Code Generated by AI

- Streamlit user interface
- Resume analysis prompt
- Groq API integration
- ATS score generation logic
- Interview question generation
- README content

## Manual Modifications Made

- Modified the UI layout
- Updated project title and descriptions
- Fixed API integration errors
- Improved prompts for better analysis
- Tested and debugged the application

## Challenges Faced

- API key configuration issues
- Groq API integration errors
- Streamlit deployment and execution issues
- Git and GitHub setup problems

## Lessons Learned

- Working with AI APIs
- Building web applications using Streamlit
- Prompt engineering
- GitHub repository management
- Debugging and problem solving

## Conclusion

The project successfully demonstrates how AI can help students improve their resumes and prepare for placements by providing intelligent feedback and suggestions.
